text.title: Meta Ads Creative Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is funnel stage defined AND production budget ≥3 variants?

conclusion.verdict: ship 3 variants in 4:5 + 9:16 only (skip 1:1 until budget)

text.example: funnel=mofu, budget OK, video budget OK → 3-5 variants across native formats.
